Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Enhances plugin functionality, making it easier for developers to create and manage user interfaces.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string based on the current Git hash for version tracking.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers keep track of which version of the code is running, ensuring better updates and bug fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are formatted.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures that time-related information is displayed more clearly for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for version tracking.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance in loading and managing game assets.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are handled in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance in games that use timestamps, leading to smoother gameplay.
